title: Jebblas Bamboo Dish Cloths,Lint Free Cleaning Cloth,Bamboo Fiber Cleaning Cloths, Kitchen Dish Cloths, Reusable Dish Rags, Pack of 6, 25x25cm
features: Multi-Purpose – Much more than simple washcloths, these reusable bamboo fibre cleaning towels can help you deal with any glass surfaces, mirrors and windows, as well as your furniture, children’s toys, electronics and even your car interior!

100% with natural bamboo fibers, it's organic with soft feel, eco-friendly, sustainable using- so good for your health and good for our planet! it's air breathing and fast drying, therefore no mildew after using like other towels do.

Perfect for eco friendly lifestyle, Bamboo cloth are extremely durable, double layered, strong cleaning ability, long lasting, reusable and washable. After a long kitchen cleaning life can be used for floors.

Bamboo Fibre is naturally Organic, antibacterial and grows without the need of chemicals. Kitchen Dish Cloth are antibacterial, stain & oil resistant and odor-free, PERFECT for kitchen, dish cleaning & household use.

Super Absorbent Cloth are more durable than cotton cloth. The fabric is also super-soft and luxurious & scratch resistant. These White Wash Cloth are also Lint free and can be used as paper towel alternatives.
description: Product Description 100% with natural bamboo fibers Jebblas bamboo cloth is extremely durable, double -layer, strong cleaning ability, long -lasting, can be reused and washed. Hanging Loops Our dishwashing cloth has a hook that can better store towels, save space, hang dry, and prevent bacterial growth Odor-Free Bamboo Fibre is naturally Organic, antibacterial and grows without the need of chemicals. Strong Cleaning Ability Kitchen Dish Cloth are antibacterial, stain & oil resistant and odor-free, PERFECT for kitchen, dish cleaning & household use. Details The size of our towel is 25*25cm.Upgrade your kitchen experience with our premium double-layer bamboo fiber towel - the perfect blend of sustainability and functionality. Multi-Purpose These reusable bamboo fibre cleaning towels can help you deal with any glass surfaces, mirrors and windows, as well as your furniture, children’s toys, electronics and even your car interior!
